title: Lime Origins
description: Some neat origins because why not :D
body:
# **ORIGINS**:

# **Enderkin** -
"When an Enderman and a Woman love eachother VERY much, they create a hybrid of an Enderman and a Human :D"

## **Powers**:
  Teleportation | "Can throw an ender pearl, even when the user has none."
  
  Ender Storage | "Open your ender chest storage without having access to the block."
  
  Hyrdophobia | "You take damage when in contact with water."
  
  Slender Body | "Your slender body lets you reach a block further."

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# **Slime** -
"Slimes have a gelatinous body, making them bouncy and flammable!"

## **Powers**:
  Slime Leap | "Leap into the air and bounce!"
  
  Slime Climb | "Your sticky body lets you climb and stick onto things."
  
  Bouncy | "Your bouncy body lets you bounce! (duh). Hold space to stop bouncing."
  
  Slime-like | "Your body is translucent and green, just like slime."
  
  Flammable | "Your slimy body is highly flammable, thus taking double fire damage."
  
  Fragile | "Being naturally weaker than a human, you only have 7 hearts."

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# **Specter** -
"Unlike most of your kind, you aren't from the Victorian era. You're the ghost of a kid from the 2000's who died in a tragic plane jacking."

## **Powers**:
Phase | "Your ghost-like form lets you phase through walls and become invisible :D"

Spectral Vision | "Due to you being a specter, your vision allows you to see entities
through obstructions."
    
Seethrough | "Your body is translucent, just like a ghost!"
    
Blinding Light | "As a result of your ghostly nature, you just really don't like the sun
(just like a discord moderator). Being in the sun while visible sets you on fire."
    
Exhuasting Work | "Phasing is exhausting work, resulting in you losing lots of hunger while
using it."
